info.name: Runloop MCP Configs API
info.description:
Configure and manage Model Context Protocol (MCP) server bindings for Devboxes — declarative MCP server configs that can be mounted to agents to expose tools.

Contact Support:
 Name: Runloop AI Support
 Email: support@runloop.ai

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the McpConfig to delete.

request.description: [Beta] Delete an existing McpConfig. This action is irreversible.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Bad request. Config is in use by active devboxes.

query.description: Filter by name (prefix match supported).
Filter by ID.
The limit of items to return. Default is 20. Max is 5000.
Load the next page of data starting after the item with the given ID.
If true (default), includes total_count in the response. Set to false to skip the count query for better performance on large datasets.
